name: Three Marks Coffee Ausias
summary: High-quality Barcelona specialty cafe with official daily hours, better for general city days than Montjuic race access.
whyItMatters: A dependable destination-quality coffee option when the group is north/east of the center or wants a serious coffee stop away from race crowds.
pros: Official site lists the Ausias address and daily 08:00-19:00 hours
European Coffee Trip lists Three Marks Coffee in Barcelona's specialty guide
Roaster/cafe setup makes it stronger as a coffee destination than a generic convenience stop
cons: Not especially close to Montjuic compared with Poble-sec/Sants options
May not be practical immediately before hill viewing

logistics.opening_hours: Mon-Sun 08:00-19:00, per Three Marks contact page accessed 2026-06-22
logistics.distance_from_base: Barcelona base; exact lodging distance unknown
logistics.distance_from_viewing_point: Roughly 4-5 km from Montjuic Park by direct map distance; not a first-choice race approach stop
logistics.transit: Near Eixample/Fort Pienc; use metro/taxi/walk depending on lodging
logistics.parking: Unknown; not recommended before race viewing
logistics.road_closure_notes: No specific closure source checked for this cafe

timing.best_visit_window: Non-race morning, or a city exploration day
timing.race_day_risk: Low for cafe operation, medium for using it before Montjuic due to distance/access

sources.title: Three Marks Coffee contact page
sources.note: Supports Ausias address and listed daily opening hours.

sources.title: European Coffee Trip Barcelona guide
sources.note: Lists Three Marks Coffee among Barcelona specialty coffee candidates.

open_questions: Check lodging location; this becomes more valuable if staying near Eixample, Sagrada Familia, or Arc de Triomf.
